attribute_bearstrength_tooltip: You can wear heavy equipment with a reduced movement penalty, ignoring up to <color=orange>{0}%</color> penalty; carry <color=orange>{1}</color> extra weight per level; inflict up to <color=orange>{2}%</color> extra blunt damage with a melee weapon (except for knives and claws) based on your amount of unspent energy (the higher the amount, the higher the damage); inflict additional <color=orange>{3}%</color> damage on trees with an axe and <color=orange>{4}%</color> damage on ores with a pickaxe.
attribute_boilingblood_tooltip: Rest and regenerate <color=orange>{0}%</color> of your health per second while sitting and out of combat, even in the cold; weak to <color=orange>poison</color>.
attribute_deerendurance_tooltip: Regenerate stamina at a <color=orange>{0}%</color> rate at level zero and <color=orange>{1}%</color> at maximum level.
attribute_burningbody_tooltip: The flames surrounding your body will add <color=orange>{0}%</color> fire damage to your arrows, <color=orange>{1}%</color> to swords, or <color=orange>{2}%</color> to any other melee weapon (except for knives and claws); it will also increase your eitr base by <color=orange>{3}</color>; every second, you have a <color=orange>{4}%</color> chance to regenerate one energy point; naturally very resistant to <color=orange>fire</color>.
attribute_celestialbody_tooltip: A body that can transcend the universe, adding <color=orange>{0}%</color> frost damage to two-handed swords, <color=orange>{1}%</color> frost damage to polearms, <color=orange>{2}%</color> spirit damage to daggers, or <color=orange>{3}%</color> poison damage to any other melee weapon (except for claws); spread <color=orange>{4}%</color> of the total damage caused by a two-handed sword, polearm or knife to nearby enemies as spirit, frost and poison; convert <color=orange>{5}%</color> of the total inflicted damage with a two-handed sword and polearm into health points, with a cap of <color=orange>{6}</color> health points per hit; it will also increase your eitr base by <color=orange>{7}</color>; naturally resistant to <color=orange>fire</color>, but weak against <color=orange>spirit</color>.
attribute_coldblood_tooltip: Absorb all self inflicted fire damage and convert <color=orange>{0}%</color> of it into health (before applying any armor or resistance effects); weak to <color=orange>frost</color>.
attribute_electrifyingbody_tooltip: Reflect <color=orange>{0}</color> lightning damage per level every time an enemy hits you, with a <color=orange>{1}%</color> chance of staggering that enemy; the electricity flowing through your body will add <color=orange>{2}%</color> lightning damage to your arrows, <color=orange>{3}%</color> to one-handed clubs, <color=orange>{4}%</color> to two-handed clubs, <color=orange>{5}%</color> to Himminafl, or <color=orange>{6}%</color> to any other melee weapon (except for knives and claws); spread <color=orange>{7}%</color> of the total damage as lightning to nearby enemies; it will also infuse the metal in your armor, granting you <color=orange>{8}%</color> extra armor when wearing full heavy armor; every second, you have a <color=orange>{9}%</color> chance to regenerate one energy point; naturally very resistant to <color=orange>lightning</color>.
attribute_foxlegs_tooltip: Jump with a <color=orange>{0}%</color> increased force and consume <color=orange>{1}%</color> less stamina from jumping; take reduced fall damage.
attribute_freezingbody_tooltip: Get <color=orange>{0}</color> extra armor per level when <color=orange>not</color> wearing any heavy armor; the cold air surrounding your body will add <color=orange>{1}%</color> frost damage to your arrows and <color=orange>{2}%</color> to your frost shards (fired with a staff); it will also increase your eitr base by <color=orange>{3}</color>; naturally very resistant to <color=orange>frost</color>.
attribute_harelegs_tooltip: You can <color=orange>jump</color> for a second time in the air; consume <color=orange>{0}%</color> less stamina from jumping; take reduced fall damage.
attribute_hunter_tooltip: As a natural hunter, imbue your spears with <color=orange>{0}%</color> additional poison damage as well as your arrows with <color=orange>{1}%</color> additional poison damage; draw bows <color=orange>{2}%</color> faster; you have a <color=orange>{3}%</color> chance to regenerate one energy point when striking an enemy with an arrow; yield <color=orange>{4}x</color> more animal skins, such as leather or hide, from hunted animals.
attribute_lumberjack_tooltip: Inflict additional <color=orange>{0}%</color> damage on trees with an axe.
attribute_sneaky_tooltip: You are <color=orange>{0}%</color> less visible to enemies and generate <color=orange>{1}%</color> less noise when sneaking; inflict <color=orange>{2}%</color> more damage when back-stabbing an enemy with a knife; regenerate <color=orange>{3}</color> energy points when 'back-stabbing' an enemy; when sneaking, every second there is a <color=orange>{4}%</color> chance that a reasonably far away enemy chasing you will lose sight of you; sneak faster.
attribute_thornbody_tooltip: The thorns on your skin will grant you <color=orange>{0}</color> additional health, as well as <color=orange>{1}%</color> poison damage to your arrows, <color=orange>{2}%</color> to spears, or <color=orange>{3}%</color> to any other melee weapon (except claws); spread <color=orange>{4}%</color> of the total damage as poison to nearby enemies, even if immune; naturally very resistant to <color=orange>poison</color>.
attribute_titanarms_tooltip: Punch <color=orange>{0}%</color> faster when <color=orange>not</color> wearing any heavy armor (or <color=orange>{1}%</color> otherwise), inflicting <color=orange>{2}</color> blunt and frost damage per punch at maximum level; your unarmed skill will add <color=orange>{3}%</color> extra damage per level, taking the total damage per punch to <color=orange>{4}</color> at maximum level; block <color=orange>{5}</color> damage per level with your arms; take down trees with your hands (harder ones every <color=orange>{6}</color> levels starting at level <color=orange>{7}</color> with your unarmed skill); you have a <color=orange>{8}%</color> chance to regenerate energy when punching or blocking an enemy.
attribute_titanarms_status_tooltip:
Unarmed Damage: <color=orange>{0}</color> (<color=orange>{1}</color>/s)
Punch Speed: <color=orange>{2}%</color>{3}
Unarmed Block Armor: <color=orange>{4}</color>
Unarmed Tier (for trees): <color=orange>{5}</color> ({6})
attribute_titanarms_weapon_forbidden: You do not need melee weapons to rip your enemies apart!
attribute_titanlegs_tooltip: Jump with a <color=orange>{0}%</color> increased force and consume <color=orange>{1}%</color> less stamina from jumping, as well as <color=orange>{2}%</color> less stamina from sprinting; when landing from a high enough altitude, you will blast enemies around you, inflicting an average of <color=orange>{3}</color> damage at maximum level; take reduced fall damage.
attribute_valkyrie_tooltip: Block <color=orange>{0}%</color> more damage per level with a shield; you have a <color=orange>{1}%</color> chance to regenerate energy when blocking an attack from an enemy; there is a <color=orange>{2}%</color> chance an enemy will be staggered when being blocked by a tower shield.
attribute_wolffur_tooltip: Get <color=orange>{0}</color> extra armor per level when <color=orange>not</color> wearing any heavy armor; your fur will absorb <color=orange>{1}%</color> of any incoming damage per level when <color=orange>not</color> wearing any heavy armor; naturally resistant to <color=orange>frost</color> and <color=orange>slash</color> damage.
attribute_wolfspeed_tooltip: Run <color=orange>{0}%</color> faster and consume <color=orange>{1}%</color> less stamina from sprinting; might also sneak and swim faster.
attribute_infusedabilities_tooltip: Greatly enhances the power of your abilities. The infused powers are listed under each ability tooltip.
attribute_infusedchitin_tooltip: Increase the block armor of your shields or titan arms by <color=orange>{0}</color> and tower shields by <color=orange>{1}</color>.
attribute_infusedeitr_tooltip: Increase your eitr base by <color=orange>{0}</color> and regenerate it <color=orange>{1}%</color> faster for every unspent/unused energy point.
attribute_infusedleatherscraps_tooltip: Reduce the passive energy regeneration time by <color=orange>{0}%</color> per level, up to <color=orange>{1}</color> levels.
attribute_infusedleatherscraps_status_to: Energy Passive Regeneration: <color=orange>{0}%</color> lower (<color=orange>{1}</color> seconds per energy point)
attribute_infusedleatherscraps_consumpti: The gods have accepted your tribute
